title: Application to Renounce Canadian Citizenship Under Subsection 9(1) - Canada.ca
content:
## Application to Renounce Canadian Citizenship Under Subsection 9(1)
Get help to open an application form or to fill one out in the Help Centre .
- Document Checklist (CIT 0402) (opens in new tab)
- Application to Renounce Canadian Citizenship (CIT 0302) (opens in new tab)
- Citizenship Photo Specifications
- Use of a Representative (IMM 5476) (opens in new tab)
- Instruction Guide (CIT 0302)
- Request form for a Change of Sex or Gender Identifier (IRM 0002) (opens in new tab)
This application is for an adult Canadian citizen who wishes to renounce his or her Canadian citizenship. To renounce your Canadian citizenship you must prove you are a Canadian citizen. You must also prove that you are, or will become, a citizen of a country other than Canada, if this application to renounce is approved.
- Read your instruction guide and download your application forms.
- Complete, sign and date your application forms.
- Pay the fees . The fee is not refundable . Check the fee schedule for our services .
- Mail your fully completed application .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
